# Intent Extractor

> **Role**: Core Component

## Purpose
*(Auto-generated summary based on code structure)*

## Architecture

### Functions
- **`extract_readme_intent`**: Extract high-level purpose from README.
- **`extract_commit_intents`**: Extract intent from commits affecting a specific file.
- **`extract_docstring_intent`**: Extract docstring from function/class source.
- **`classify_commit_intent`**: Classify commit message intent category.
- **`extract_issue_references`**: Extract issue/PR references from commit message.
- **`build_node_intent_profile`**: Build comprehensive intent profile for a node.
- **`analyze_intent_coverage`**: Analyze intent coverage across all nodes.
